subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enamored of the truth! The receptivity present in any object attracts divine confirmations. You will observe that, when the earth acquires receptivity
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مفتون حقیقت استعداد در هر شیء جاذب تاییدات الهیه است ملاحظه مینماای چون
subcodes.subjects: @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @education and the development of capacity
